A violation of subdivision (b) or (c) of Section 21367 is an infraction, except as follows:

(a) A willful violation is a misdemeanor.

(b) A willful violation committed in a manner exhibiting a wanton disregard for the safety of persons is a misdemeanor punishable by imprisonment in the county jail for not more than one year.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 1. Offenses [40000.1 - 40273]
#### Article 1. Violation of Code [40000.1 - 40008]
##### § 40000.14

A violation of subdivision (b) or (c) of Section 21367 is an infraction, except as follows:

(a) A willful violation is a misdemeanor.

(b) A willful violation committed in a manner exhibiting a wanton disregard for the safety of persons is a misdemeanor punishable by imprisonment in the county jail for not more than one year.

*(Added by Stats. 1986, Ch. 748, Sec. 3.)*

subsections.text: A violation of subdivision (b) or (c) of Section 21367 is an infraction, except as follows:

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A willful violation is a misdemeanor.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A willful violation committed in a manner exhibiting a wanton disregard for the safety of persons is a misdemeanor punishable by imprisonment in the county jail for not more than one year.
